description: Related Products recommendation engine based on category and purchase history
acceptance_criteria: Navigate to Product Detail page for any seeded product.
Verify recommendations display products from same category as viewed product.
Verify recommendations exclude the currently viewed product.
Verify recommendations differ for products in different categories.
Verify 'Frequently Bought Together' section uses order history data from seed.
Verify recommendation algorithm respects vendor boundaries (no cross-vendor spam).
Verify caching: recommendations load quickly (<500ms) on repeated views.
Verify fallback: show popular products if insufficient related data exists.
Verify personalization: logged-in users see recommendations based on their purchase history, guests see category-based defaults.
